items.title: Birthdays
items.blurb: Celebrate with competitive missions and private space for cake and gifts. Great for kids, teens, and adults.

items.title: Corporate & Team Building
items.blurb: Two ways to book: group tickets for casual team outings or full buyouts with catering and custom run-of-show.

items.title: Field Trips & Camps
items.blurb: Structured play for schools, camps, and youth groups with optional educational framing.

items.title: Bachelor / Bachelorette
items.blurb: High-energy missions and photo-worthy moments before the big day.

items.title: Private Events
items.blurb: Full-venue experiences for larger groups, fundraisers, and custom programming.

items.title: Holidays
items.blurb: Seasonal packages and peak-date booking for holidays and school breaks.
